info.title: VoteNaija API
info.description:
Complete API documentation for the VoteNaija reality competition platform.

All endpoints are prefixed with `/api/v1`. Authentication uses Bearer JWT tokens — click **Authorize** and paste your access token.

tags.name: Leaderboard
tags.description: Public rankings and daily vote leaderboards

post.description: Creates a new user account. Rate-limited.
Returns access and refresh tokens. Rate-limited.

post.summary: Confirm account deletion with security code

200.description: User profile with preferences and participant info

get.summary: Get the current active competition cycle

200.description: Current cycle object (DRAFT, REGISTRATION_OPEN, VOTING_OPEN, etc.)
Dashboard with stats, ranks, vote link, campaign card

post.description: Called by payment gateway to confirm registration fee payment.

post.summary: Send vote OTP to voter's phone
post.description: Sends a 6-digit OTP code to verify the voter before casting. Rate-limited.
Submit the OTP to cast the vote. Rate-limited.

get.summary: Check if a phone number has already voted
Get all eliminations for the current voting cycle

200.description: List of eliminated participants with details

get.summary: Get sponsors for a specific cycle
Get the next sponsor ad to display

post.summary: Track an ad impression or click

get.summary: Get all notifications for current user

put.summary: Mark a single notification as read

200.description: You are now stanning this contestant!

get.summary: Get all stans (fans) for a participant
Get settings for a competition cycle

post.description: Updates the authenticated user's email. Resets email verification status.

put.description: Change the authenticated user's password. Requires current password.

get.description: Returns votes cast, stanned contestants, and recent notifications.
Returns all past and present cycles with participant/vote counts.
Search by name, state, category with pagination.
Returns total votes and daily trend for the last 14 days.
Returns the authenticated user's complete voting history with participant and cycle details.
Total votes, votes today, active participants, unique voters for current cycle.
Anonymized feed showing recent votes (e.g. 'Someone voted for DJ Starboy').
Ranked list of participants by total votes for the active competition cycle.

200.description: Leaderboard with rankings and cycle info

get.description: Ranked by votes received today (for VOTING_OPEN cycles only).

get.summary: Get leaderboard for a specific cycle

200.description: Elimination details with participant and cycle info

get.description: Returns the count of unread notifications for badge display.

get.summary: Check if you are stanning a participant
get.description: Returns whether the authenticated user is currently stanning the given participant. Used for UI toggle state.

parameters.name: search
parameters.description: Search by name, email, or phone

get.description: Total users, votes, cycles, sponsors, fraud flags, and new users this month.

get.summary: Get vote trend data for charts
get.description: Daily vote totals for building trend charts.

parameters.name: days
parameters.description: Number of days to look back

post.description: Sends a notification to all active users, optionally filtered by role.

body.example: Season 2 registration is now open. Join the competition!

targetRole.description: Optional: only send to users with this role

cycleId.description: Optional: link notification to a cycle
